W.label: the window · you can see the north bluff from here

D.label: the cabin door · out to the path

P.label: a poster of a great blue heron · Sylvie's

L.label: a stack of cassette tapes · Nika's · one is labeled 'Portland 7/93'

notes: Cabin Osprey · three campers · Sylvie Nakagawa (the singer), Ollie Fisk (the anxious swimmer), Nika Voss (the rebel).  Sylvie's heron poster on the north wall.  Nika's cassette tapes on the south bunk shelf · one labeled 'Portland 7/93.'  Door south to the camp path.
